description: In the evolving landscape of education amidst a pandemic, our email template seamlessly bridges the gap between school and technology, catering to diverse educational needs. This pastel-themed template, suitable for all classroom-related communication, makes teaching and learning more engaging in the new normal. It's designed to keep students, parents, and educators informed about class schedules, courses, and other school updates. Amidst the COVID-19 crisis, our template serves as an efficient tool for educational institutions, promoting a smooth transition to digital learning. Whether it's about sharing course details or new safety protocols, this template makes communication simple, clear, and visually appealing. With a focus on education in the time of a pandemic, it ensures that learning never stops.
short_description: Amidst the COVID-19 crisis, our pastel-themed email template bridges the gap between school and technology, promoting a smooth transition to digital learning. Ideal for sharing class schedules, course details, and pandemic safety protocols, it ensures that education never stops, even in the new normal.

designer.description: I design, create layouts, videos and animations. I have been working in the world of communication since 2012. I believe that feeding on cinema, music, and art is an essential source of enrichment to always give new forms to creativity.

html_data:
YOUR LOGO HERE

 

CAN BE DONE!

Adapting the new normal, supporting changes!

Far far away, behind the word mountains, far from the countries Vokalia.

 

NEVER STOP LEARNING

From public to personal spaces

The most obvious change has been learning shifting from the classroom to the home, with technology needing to be adopted and improved to accommodate this. 

WATCH MORE
 

LEARN

MORE & SAFE

Adapting the new normal, supporting changes!

Far far away, behind the word mountains, far from the countries Vokalia.

 TELL ME MORE
 

A CHANGE IN FOCUS

From teaching to learning

While learning remotely, there’s been a big switch in focus from teaching to learning; with parents stepping in to help conduct home schooling. 

WATCH MORE
 

DISCOVER THE CLASS

Engaging themes every week and an ongoing teaching method
